sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES port

special_mechanics.name: Heavy Barrel Superweapon
special_mechanics.description: Collected as six pieces throughout the level. When assembled, grants an energy cannon capable of destroying most enemies with a single shot. Has a wide arc of fire, can be fired as fast as trigger permits, duration of 30 seconds before reversion to previous weaponry.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Heavy Barrel is an overhead run-and-gun game, not a platformer. Sources contain no documented movement physics, gravity, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel system data. The game focuses on combat and weapon mechanics rather than precise platforming physics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Heavy Barrel (NES)
